# Soul Media Group

> Soul Media Group is an executive media production, visual editing, 3D modeling, and strategic agency based in Tampa Bay & Clearwater, Florida.

## Agency Overview
- **Name**: Soul Media Group
- **Primary Website**: https://soulmediagroup.com
- **Contact Email**: soulmediagroup.info@gmail.com
- **Headquarters Location**: Tampa / Clearwater / St. Petersburg, Florida (3-hour regional coverage radius for on-location filming + nationwide remote coverage)
- **Intake Status**: Accepting Select Clients Q4

## Executive Leadership Core
- **Jada Brown** — Founder & Executive Producer / Brand Director. Visionary brand architect defining core brand presence, client identity, and strategic alignment.
- **Isaiah Chandler** — Systems & Operations Director / Growth Strategist. Operations mastermind architecting post-production workflows, 3D modeling, tech automations, and remote talent integration.
- **Joe Irizarry** — Director of Photography & Videography / Lead Visual Editor. Master lensman and editor directing 4K commercial shoots, photography, sound design, and signature visual cuts.

## Core Capabilities & Offerings
1. **Cinematic Filming & Photography**: On-location directing, 4K video shoots, lifestyle/people filming, and studio product photography.
2. **Post-Production & Visual Editing**: High-impact short-form reel editing, master sound design, color grading, and multi-platform delivery.
3. **3D Modeling & Interactive Web Solutions**: Custom 3D product renders, WebGL canvas integrations, bespoke websites, and smart workflow automation engines.
4. **Graphic Design & Brand Assets**: Commercial graphic design, pitch decks, social media templates, merch graphics, and brand style kits.
5. **Intentional Social Media Management**: Purposeful content calendar planning, community voice engagement, and audience connection.
6. **Talent Sourcing & Training Advisory**: Candidate recruiting, vetting, and SOP best-practices training for dedicated in-house client SMMs and editors.

## Package Tiers
- **Filming & Production Retainers**: $2,200/mo to $8,500/mo (On-location filming, photography, 3D modeling, master editing).
- **Full Retainer & Social Management**: $3,200/mo to $11,500/mo (Filming, editing, graphic design, social management, talent sourcing).
- **Web, 3D & Tech Automations**: $3,500 to $12,000+ (Custom websites, 3D renders, lead calculators, workflow pipelines).
